flow_points: Scotland started their innings strongly, scoring 49 runs for 0 wickets in the Powerplay.
HG Munsey anchored Scotland's batting with 84 runs off 58 balls, contributing 40.6% of the total.
Scotland achieved a high-scoring finish in the Death Overs with a run rate of 14.2, shifting match momentum.
In response, Italy scored 54 runs in their Powerplay but lost 3 wickets.
Italy's early wicket loss prevented them from building a stable foundation for their chase.
MA Leask delivered a crucial bowling spell for Scotland, taking 4 wickets for 17 runs.
MRJ Watt supported Leask with a spell of 2 wickets for 24 runs.
Ali Hasan maintained bowling pressure, conceding only 21 runs for 1 wicket.
Italy struggled under extreme chase pressure (Index: 85.0), leading to a late-innings collapse.
Scotland secured a significant victory, winning the match by 73 runs.
